comments: The SHA256 hashes for the source archives need to be computed and replaced in the src sections of both derivative files, as they cannot be determined without fetching the packages.
All listed dependencies are assumed to be available in nixpkgs under the standard Python package names; if any are missing or named differently, additional adjustments may be needed.
The build-system is set to setuptools assuming the packages use setup.py; if they use pyproject.toml with different build systems (e.g., hatchling or poetry), this may need updating.
Python version is set by pkgs.python3 which defaults to the latest in nixpkgs; ensure it meets the minimum requirements (>=3.11 for mofaflex, >=3.10 for mudata).
